title: The Starved Stalker
body:
![The Starved Stalker](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Starved_Stalker/MP_StarvedStalker_header.webp)
![Description](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Starved_Stalker/MP_StarvedStalker_description.webp)
_**You are unsafe. It is hungry. As long as you are around, it will have food. Try not to become its prey. Do not fall to it.**_

The Starved Stalker will sense you and start walking towards you, and once it is close enough, it will begin the chase.

The Hungering Fields come from the world where the Starved Stalker came from. It is infesting the world. Beware of the creatures that dwell there.

Summon the manifestation of Famine by peaking its interest, and try to kill it for great rewards.

Good luck...

[![https://www.bisecthosting.com/itssmudgy](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Starved_Stalker/MP_StarvedStalker_promo.webp)](https://www.bisecthosting.com/itssmudgy)
 
[![Join Our Discord!](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Starved_Stalker/MP_StarvedStalker_discord.webp)](https://discord.gg/hVcqt4vzbu)

_Support me on Ko-Fi: [https://ko-fi.com/itssmudgy](https://ko-fi.com/itssmudgy)_

_Huge thanks to [LxM] for what used to be the chase theme! It may just be a music disc now, but you still should go check them out on Spotify: [https://open.spotify.com/artist/3ymsY6E8KL3q78BhiKlyfW](https://open.spotify.com/artist/3ymsY6E8KL3q78BhiKlyfW)_

_Huge thanks to Rupter for Famine's theme and old model! Go check out their mod: [https://modrinth.com/mod/the-slumbering-omen](https://modrinth.com/mod/the-slumbering-omen)_



**This mod requires Geckolib**
